name: yuzora-pi-acp
description: Yuzora built-in ACP adapter for the pi coding agent (drives pi via its in-process SDK; see .yuuzu/specs/pi-sdk-adapter-migration.html)

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs && bun build src/session-host.ts --target=node --format=esm --outfile=dist/session-host.mjs
